pi_items.source: setup_task.sh instructions and verifier.py output path evaluation logic
setup_task.sh dynamically writes PLATESCL=0.25 into the FITS header if it is missing

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real VLT V-band FITS data of globular cluster Messier 12 downloaded from ESA Hubble (Vcomb.zip). The expected output path for the FWHM measurement results is /home/ga/AstroImages/psf_analysis/fwhm_results.txt. The plate scale of 0.25 arcsec/pixel is verified to be dynamically injected into the FITS header via setup_task.sh and validated by verifier.py for arcsecond conversion.
